## Summary

Describe the change clearly.

## Problem

What user-facing or system issue is happening?

## Cause

What is the root cause?

## Solution

How does this PR address the cause?

## Changes

List concrete code and behavior changes made in this PR.

## Validation

List what you ran locally.

- [ ] Build succeeds
- [ ] Tests pass (if tests exist)
- [ ] No new warnings

## Checklist

- [ ] Follows docs/STYLE_GUIDE.md
- [ ] Updated docs where needed
- [ ] Added tests for behavior changes
- [ ] Linked related issue(s)
- [ ] Uses project status-code conventions (0 success, negative for
	failures/special cases)
- [ ] Avoids writing to output parameters before success is confirmed
- [ ] Declares local variables at top of C functions
